title: Pajamas Live at The Caverns
description: Pajamas Live at The Caverns captures the band's set recorded deep underground at The Caverns in Tennessee. Contributions include keyboards, recording, and mixing.

title: Featherbed
description: Featherbed is Pajamas first full length album as a quartet. Contributions include keyboards, recording, arranging, mixing, and publishing.

title: You're Awake – Live at Willis Sound
description: You're Awake – Live at Willis Sound captures Pajamas' live energy and improvisation. Contributions include piano, synth, and publishing.

title: Aapprrehension
description: Aapprrehension – Music written and recorded with Alana Pollard for her University of Michigan theatre performance “Introducing Nobody”.

title: Astronaut
description: Astronaut – Tyrus Archer shares deeply personal poems set to a genre bending, experimental (yet welcoming) hip-hop.

title: Peonies
description: Peonies was created as a score for a short film of the same name. The film is currently in consideration for the Ann Arbor Film Festival.

title: Nokomis Breaks EP
description: Nokomis Breaks EP – This is my first non-electronic project. Contributions include composition, production, engineering, and instrumentation.
